name: study1_cohort
title: Hospitalized Patients with Primary Diagnosis of Heart Failure
description: The cohort includes patients aged 18 or above admitted to the hospital with heart failure as the primary diagnosis code and eGFR/serum creatinine available at discharge.

entity.name: pid
entity.description: A unique identifier assigned to each patient in the cohort.

entity.name: encounterId
entity.description: A unique identifier for each hospital encounter/stay.

entry.name: patientEncounter
entry.description: Captures hospital encounters when a patient is admitted for care.

period.description: Includes all hospital encounters for the defined cohort population.

entity.name: pid
entity.description: A unique identifier assigned to each patient in the cohort.

eligibility.name: adultHeartFailureCohort
eligibility.description: Identify adult patients (≥18 years at admission) who were admitted primarily for heart failure. Inclusion requires a Condition resource coded with ICD-10 heart failure–related diagnoses and categorized as encounter-diagnosis. Valid laboratory observations (serum creatinine or GFR) should exist in the encounter.
